title: acmella radicans
intro: Acmella radicans, also known as Sensitive Plant, is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, possessing anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Acmella radicans include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The herbal preparations of Acmella radicans typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or using the plant in capsule or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
